19. A Writer’s Method
7. The Six Steps
How to refine and develop your work


Final Takeaways

✅ Yes, McKee’s and McCloud’s chapters align well.
✅ Every narrative principle from McKee has a direct equivalent in visual storytelling.
✅ The workbook can maintain a 1:1 ratio between film storytelling and comic storytelling lessons.
✅ The exercises for Derek will directly integrate lessons from both perspectives.
